chunks.text: ORDER SHEET THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI JCM No. 32 of 2009 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For hearing of CMA No. 932/2010. 2. For hearing of main petition. 27.02.2026. None present. ********** None present on behalf of the Petitioner nor has any intimation been received. This matter has been pending for over 15 years without any significant progress. It appears that the Petitioner has lost interest in pursuing the matter, which is accordingly dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AYAZ
